title: Runloop Gateway Config
description: A GatewayConfig defines a configuration for proxying API requests through the agent gateway. It specifies the target endpoint and how credentials should be applied.

id.description: The unique identifier of the GatewayConfig.

account_id.description: The account ID that owns this config.

name.description: The human-readable name of the GatewayConfig. Unique per account (or globally for system configs).

auth_mechanism.description: How credentials should be applied to proxied requests.

description.description: Optional description for this gateway configuration.

create_time_ms.description: Creation time of the GatewayConfig (Unix timestamp in milliseconds).

AuthMechanismView.description: Defines how credentials are applied to HTTP requests when proxying through the gateway.
